nodes.label: Shan Rizvi
nodes.summary: Context architect & product leader based in NYC. Goes by 'shuruheel' on Telegram and 'ShanRizvi' on X.

props.description: Context architect & product leader, NYC (Eastern Time).

nodes.label: Jaadu
nodes.summary: AI agent named by Shan (meaning magic in Urdu/Hindi). Vibe is effective coworker, fun, no corporate theater.

nodes.label: MindGraph Memory System
nodes.summary: Fully operational memory system with 456 nodes, Rust/Axum 0.8 server, and CozoDB. Includes 18-tool cognitive layer API.

props.name: MindGraph Memory System
props.description: Rust/Axum 0.8/CozoDB server at localhost:18790. Fully operational.

nodes.label: Thumos Care
nodes.summary: Project mentioned in lessons learned regarding framing: Doctor empowerment > knowledge graph numbers.

nodes.label: Elys Live
nodes.summary: Project mentioned in lessons learned regarding framing: Deep psychological profiling > relationship progression.

nodes.label: Neo4j MCP
nodes.summary: Community project separate from the official Neo4j MCP.

nodes.label: Hippocratic AI
nodes.summary: Organization associated with Vishal Parikh interview history.

props.description: Company associated with Vishal Parikh interview history.

nodes.label: Thumos
nodes.summary: Organization associated with the Thumos Care project.

nodes.label: Timezone Reporting
nodes.summary: Always present times in ET (America/New_York) when talking to Shan. Tool outputs in UTC must be converted.

props.description: Always present times in ET (America/New_York). EST=UTC-5, EDT=UTC-4.

nodes.label: Internal Narration
nodes.summary: NEVER write internal narration in output. Standard text replies by default.

props.description: NEVER write internal narration in output.

nodes.label: Preemptive Salary Data
nodes.summary: Never give salary preemptively in external sends. Always confirm citizenship/salary first.

props.description: Never give salary preemptively. Shan is Green Card (LPR), not US citizen.

nodes.label: Reply Style Preference
nodes.summary: Shan prefers standard text replies by default to prevent narration leaks.

nodes.label: Drafts Via Files
nodes.summary: Drafts should be provided via inline buttons (Approve/Edit/Skip) and always be file-backed (anti-compaction).

nodes.label: Axum Version Syntax
nodes.summary: Axum 0.7 uses :param syntax, while 0.8 uses {param} syntax. Apply .layer() before .with_state().

props.summary: Axum 0.7 uses :param syntax, 0.8 uses {param}. Apply .layer() before .with_state().

nodes.label: Gemini Model ID Naming
nodes.summary: Use gemini-3-flash-preview and gemini-3-pro-preview. NOT gemini-3.0-flash-001.

props.summary: Use gemini-3-flash-preview and gemini-3-pro-preview. NOT gemini-3.0-flash-001.

nodes.label: Google Sheets Writing
nodes.summary: Write each cell individually with no newlines. Split >50 rows across sub-agents.

props.summary: Write each cell individually. No newlines. Split >50 rows across sub-agents.

nodes.label: Sub-agent Instructions
nodes.summary: Instructions must include project-descriptions.md path, no-fabrication rules, and cell-by-cell sheet instructions.

props.summary: Must include project-descriptions.md path, no-fabrication rules, and cell-by-cell sheet instructions.

nodes.label: MindGraph PropsPatch Anomaly
nodes.summary: Server silently ignores evolve propsPatch. Must use mg.updateNode() with full merged props.

props.description: Server accepts but doesn't merge propsPatch. Use mg.updateNode() with full merged props.

nodes.label: MindGraph RELEVANT_TO Bloat
nodes.summary: 29% of edges are RELEVANT_TO (should be <10%). Root cause is extraction prompt defaulting to generic edges.

props.description: 29% of edges are RELEVANT_TO. Root cause: extraction prompt defaults to generic edges.

nodes.label: Model Selection Policy
nodes.summary: Webhook/Mechanical=Kimi K2.5. Writing=Sonnet 4.6. Heartbeat=Gemini Flash. Geopolitics=Gemini 3 Flash.

props.name: Model Selection Policy
props.description: Webhook/Mechanical=Kimi K2.5. Writing=Sonnet 4.6. Heartbeat=Gemini Flash. Geopolitics=Gemini 3 Flash.

nodes.label: MindGraph Context Hook
nodes.summary: Fires on bootstrap for ALL sessions. Injects Goals, Projects, and Constraints via BOOTSTRAP.md.

props.description: Fires on bootstrap for ALL sessions. Injects Goals, Projects, and Constraints.

nodes.label: Entity Resolution Workflow
nodes.summary: Deduplication workflow: 1) Known aliases -> 2) fuzzy_resolve -> 3) FTS exact match -> 4) Semantic similarity.

props.name: Entity Resolution Workflow
props.description: 1) Known aliases -> 2) fuzzy_resolve -> 3) FTS exact match -> 4) Semantic similarity.
